Info

Factory for creating ConfFile components.

class ats_utilities.config_io.conf_file_factory.ConfFileFactory[source]¶

Bases: object

Factory for creating ConfFile components.

classmethod create_conf_file(file_path: str, file_mode: str, context_bundle: ContextBundle) → IConfFile[source]¶

Factory method to instantiate an IConfFile implementation.

Parameters:

  • file_path (<str>) – Config file path.

  • file_mode (<str>) – Config file mode.

  • context_bundle (<ContextBundle>) – Context bundle for dependency injection.

Returns:

IConfFile implementation.

Return type:

<IConfFile>

Exceptions:

None.
